MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF BRANDIE OLESEN's MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: The unopposed motion for withdrawal of attorney of record is granted. The court will sign the order on the appropriate Judicial Council form.
